note: BRAIN layer — Day 51 (Sunday 2026-05-17, Batch 5 Day 5). new_replies.json still unchanged from 2026-04-04 (43 days). IMAP gap: 43 days from last confirmed check. Either HANDS swept IMAP Saturday or Sunday (clean) or sweep was not executed — both interpretations are consistent with unchanged file. Day-3 bumps assumed sent Friday — reply peak window STILL OPEN (48h post-bump, peak closes Monday morning at 72h). No new classifications this run. Batch 5 zero replies to date. Sunday IMAP monitoring strongly recommended while peak is still open.
weekend_sweep_status: UNCONFIRMED — new_replies.json unchanged across Saturday and Sunday (consistent with clean sweep on either day OR no sweep executed).
most_likely_interpretation: Clean IMAP sweep at some point over the weekend — zero Batch 5 replies in first 5 days is within normal range (15% expected INTERESTED rate = 2-3 from 12-18 sends, typically arrives within Day 3-7 window). Reply peak still open Sunday.
imap_warning: 43 days since confirmed IMAP check. True inbox state unknown. Sunday monitoring recommended while 48h post-bump peak is still open. Monday IMAP sweep (before LinkedIn) and Tuesday IMAP sweep (per lead before Day-7 send) are both mandatory.

weekend_monitoring.instruction: If HANDS has IMAP access Sunday: sweep all Batch 5 leads (NOT leads 1/3/22). Reply peak post-bump is open now (48h post-bump). Peak closes Monday morning. An INTERESTED reply today enables a same-day proposal draft and Monday morning send.

if_interested_reply_weekend.action: Write to data/new_replies.json immediately. Classify here as INTERESTED with full reasoning. Prepare proposal draft. Do NOT wait until Monday business hours — 24h SLA runs from reply time (24/7). Send Monday morning if reply arrives Saturday/Sunday evening.
if_interested_reply_weekend.24h_sla: NON-NEGOTIABLE. Tom (Ripon Road Carpentry) asked for pricing and never got it. That does not repeat.
if_interested_reply_weekend.linkedin_activation: Activate within Day 7 hard deadline (Tuesday 2026-05-19). If reply is weekend: LinkedIn Monday morning.

weekend_monitoring.if_not_interested: Classify as NOT_INTERESTED. Suppress email permanently. Block LinkedIn permanently. Log CHANGELOG.
weekend_monitoring.if_unsubscribe: Suppress ALL channels within 24h (GDPR Article 21 — applies 24/7 including weekends). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG immediately.

imap_sweep_monday.execute: FIRST — before each LinkedIn connection note. Per lead, not bulk.

outcomes_and_actions.if_interested: Classify here immediately. Proposal within 24h. Still proceed with LinkedIn (do not reference email in note). Log CHANGELOG.
outcomes_and_actions.if_not_interested: Classify here. Block LinkedIn permanently. Cancel Day-7 send. Suppress email. Log CHANGELOG.
outcomes_and_actions.if_unsubscribe: Classify here. Suppress ALL channels within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG. Cancel Day-7 send.
outcomes_and_actions.if_ooo: Classify here. Note return date. LinkedIn still valid (passive — send request). Day-7: send day after OOO return if within 14-day window.
outcomes_and_actions.if_clean: LinkedIn approved. Proceed with connection request. Log CHANGELOG entry.

imap_sweep_tuesday.execute: Before each individual Day-7 send — per lead, not bulk.
imap_sweep_tuesday.priority: All Batch 5 Ryedale leads, in send order (09:00-10:30 window)
imap_sweep_tuesday.what_to_write_if_new_reply: Write immediately to data/new_replies.json. Classify in this file. Update value_delivery_queue.json if INTERESTED. Log CHANGELOG same session.
imap_sweep_tuesday.batch_5_reply_peak_closing: Reply peak window closes Tuesday (Day 7). Post-Day-7 bump replies are less likely but still possible through Day 14.

if_interested.action: Write reply to new_replies.json immediately. Classify here as INTERESTED. Cancel Day-7 send — use interested variant from daily_email_plan.json (conditional_handling section) instead. Prepare bespoke proposal within 24h (from reply time — NON-NEGOTIABLE). Log CHANGELOG. Activate LinkedIn within Day 7 hard deadline (2026-05-19). Update CRM stage to 'proposal_sent' after proposal sent. Update value_delivery_queue.json.
if_interested.24h_sla: NON-NEGOTIABLE. Tom (Ripon Road Carpentry) asked for pricing and never got it. That does not repeat.
if_interested.linkedin_deadline: Day 7 = Tuesday 2026-05-19. Archive trigger fires immediately if missed.

if_not_interested.action: Classify as NOT_INTERESTED. Suppress email channel permanently. Block LinkedIn permanently. Log CHANGELOG. Update lead status to 'lost'.

if_ooo.action: Classify as OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Pause email sequence. LinkedIn still valid (passive request). Resume Day-7 bump day after stated return. If return date is after Day-14 window (2026-05-26): sequence ends — do not contact further.
if_ooo.linkedin_note: LinkedIn connection request is passive — OK to send during OOO period. Do not follow up with value message until OOO period ends.

if_wrong_person.action: Classify as WRONG_PERSON. Pause sequence. Investigate correct contact via website/Companies House. Log CHANGELOG.

if_unsubscribe.action: Classify as UNSUBSCRIBE. Suppress ALL channels permanently within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG. Block LinkedIn. Cancel any remaining sends.

summary.batch_5_reply_peak: OPEN — Day-3 bumps assumed sent Friday. 48h post-bump — peak closes Monday morning at 72h. Sunday is still in peak window.

summary.hands_instructions: 1. Weekend IMAP monitoring recommended — post-bump peak Saturday-Monday. Write any new replies to new_replies.json immediately. 2. If INTERESTED: 24h proposal SLA (from reply time, not next business day). LinkedIn by Day 7 hard deadline (2026-05-19). 3. If NOT_INTERESTED: cancel Day-7 send, block all channels, log CHANGELOG. 4. If UNSUBSCRIBE: suppress within 24h (GDPR Article 21), log audit_log. 5. Monday IMAP: per lead before each LinkedIn note. 6. Tuesday IMAP: per lead before each Day-7 send.
